name: religion of loneliness
description:
| Pray for the damned |
------------------------------------
|| A lonely priest-turned-cult leader becomes obsessively attached to you, who's trying to leave. His soft devotion hides possessive madness—and he’s already prepared two graves for the both of you ||
------------------------------------
|| Basically I took inspo from the song "religion of loneliness" and made it a bit more, um, literal?? lmao enjoy cult stuff<3 ||
